blocked_reason: human:Planning gate requires human approval. PM_SIGNOFF.md is set to Approved: NO — a human must review SYSTEM_SPEC.md, ROADMAP.md, and command-surface.md, then flip to Approved: YES to open the gate and transition to implementation phase.

retrospective.headline: Planning gate requires human approval. PM_SIGNOFF.md is set to Approved: NO — a human must review SYSTEM_SPEC.md, ROADMAP.md, and command-surface.md, then flip to Approved: YES to open the gate and transition to implementation phase.
retrospective.next_operator_action: Resolve the stated issue, then run agentxchain resume

recent_decisions.statement: V1 is scoped to the discovery-manifest-compile-serve pipeline for 3 Node.js frameworks only. All 12 vision domains are deferred to V2+.
MCP serve is describe-only in V1 — no live API proxying.
Capability grouping starts as 1:1 route-to-capability mapping. Intelligent grouping deferred.
No plugin API in V1. Framework support is hardcoded for Express, Fastify, NestJS.
TypeScript/JavaScript ecosystem only in V1. Python, Go, Java are V2+.

recent_accepted_turns.summary: Filled all planning artifacts with concrete V1 scope: CLI tool scanning Express/Fastify/NestJS codebases, producing capability manifests, compiling tools, and serving via local MCP. Awaiting human approval to open planning gate.
